title: cert-manager Operator
description: TLS certificate automation. Install-and-go operator with no additional CRs needed for base install. Specify {} for all defaults.

enabled.title: Enabled
enabled.description: Set false to skip cert-manager installation.

approval.title: Install Plan Approval
approval.description: InstallPlan approval strategy. Automatic installs updates immediately; Manual requires admin approval.

source.title: Catalog Source
source.description: OLM CatalogSource name. Override for disconnected or custom catalogs.

letsencrypt.title: LetsEncrypt Configuration
letsencrypt.description: Configure cert-manager with LetsEncrypt DNS-01 validation. Choose the provider as aws or cloudflare. AWS uses Route53 for DNS-01. Renders ExternalSecret, ClusterIssuer, and Certificate resources.

email.title: ACME Email
email.description: Contact email for LetsEncrypt account registration.

provider.title: DNS Provider
provider.description: Choose the DNS provider for DNS-01 challenges.

hostedZoneID.title: Hosted Zone ID
hostedZoneID.description: AWS Route53 hosted zone ID for DNS-01 challenge records.

region.title: AWS Region
region.description: AWS region for Route53 API calls.

role.title: IAM Role ARN
role.description: AWS IAM role ARN for Route53 access.

secretStore.title: ClusterSecretStore Name
secretStore.description: Name of the ClusterSecretStore for Route53 credentials.

remoteRef.title: Remote Secret Key
remoteRef.description: Key in the external secret store containing aws-access-key-id and aws-secret-access-key.

secretStore.title: ClusterSecretStore Name
secretStore.description: Name of the ClusterSecretStore for Cloudflare credentials.

remoteRef.title: Remote Secret Key
remoteRef.description: Key in the external secret store containing api-token.
